testcase.name: testFullUiFlowWhenApiAlive

skipped.message: API reqres.in đang không sẵn sàng, skip UI flow

testcase.system-err: Mar 24, 2026 2:47:56 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Mar 24, 2026 2:47:56 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.80. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.29.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's. [API PRECONDITION] Failed: Base URI cannot be null

skipped.message: Bỏ qua test UI vì API login precondition thất bại
